title: mentha × villosa var. dossiniana
intro: Mentha × villosa var. dossiniana, also known as Corsican mint, is a hybrid species of mint, derived from the cross between Mentha × villosa and a species of peppermint. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea and headaches, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa var. dossiniana include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
